on_entry: /execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-1 ~ red_concrete run playsound note.bass @s
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-1 ~ red_concrete run title @s actionbar §c定員オーバーです
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-1 ~ red_concrete run tp @s -1 -55 179 90 0
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-2 ~ red_concrete run playsound note.bass @s
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-2 ~ red_concrete run title @s actionbar §c定員オーバーです

/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-1 ~ blue_concrete run title @s actionbar §c定員オーバーです
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-1 ~ blue_concrete run tp @s -1 -55 179 90 0
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-2 ~ blue_concrete run playsound note.bass @s
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-2 ~ blue_concrete run title @s actionbar §c定員オーバーです
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches 10.. if block ~ ~-2 ~ blue_concrete run tp @s -1 -55 179 90 0
/execute as @a[tag=redjoin2] at @s unless block ~ ~-1 ~ red_concrete run tag @s remove redjoin2
/execute as @a[tag=redjoin2] at @s unless block ~ ~-2 ~ red_concrete run tag @s remove redjoin2
/execute as @a[tag=bluejoin2] at @s unless block ~ ~-1 ~ blue_concrete run tag @s remove bluejoin2
/execute as @a[tag=bluejoin2] at @s unless block ~ ~-2 ~ blue_concrete run tag @s remove bluejoin2
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches ..9 if block ~ ~-1 ~ red_concrete run tag @s add redjoin2
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!redjoin2] at @s if score redteam2 joincount matches ..9 if block ~ ~-2 ~ red_concrete run tag @s add redjoin2
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches ..9 if block ~ ~-1 ~ blue_concrete run tag @s add bluejoin2
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=!bluejoin2] at @s if score blueteam2 joincount matches ..9 if block ~ ~-2 ~ blue_concrete run tag @s add bluejoin2
/scoreboard players set redteam2 joincount 0
/scoreboard players set blueteam2 joincount 0
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=redjoin2] run scoreboard players add redteam2 joincount 1
/execute if score gamemode config matches 20 as @a[tag=bluejoin2] run scoreboard players add blueteam2 joincount 1
